text: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
The weather forecast calls for rain tomorrow and continued disappointment throughout the week.
My dog used to chase people on a bike a lot. It got so bad I had to take his bike away.
I asked the librarian if the library had any books on paranoia. She whispered, 'They're right behind you.'
Scientists have discovered a new element that is both highly reactive and completely useless. They've named it Administratium.
The stock market is just a casino where the players wear suits and pretend they know what they're doing.
My therapist says I have a preoccupation with vengeance. We'll see about that.
A committee is a group of the unwilling, picked from the unfit, to do the unnecessary.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
The early bird gets the worm, but the second mouse gets the cheese.
